economic_notes: Government business enterprises include NSE Development (Phase 2) LP (real estate/inventory), Tsu Holdings LP, Tsu Aggregates LP, NSE (Phase 2) GP Inc., and Ts'uubaa-asatx Development Corporation. Hul'q'humi'num Fisheries LP financials were unavailable and excluded, causing qualified audit opinion. NSE Development (Phase 2) LP had revenue of $4,209,208 and net income of $421,928.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because Hul'q'humi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership financial information was unavailable and excluded from consolidated statements. Prior year (2022) included a $4,638,491 claim settlement as a one-time item which significantly inflated prior year revenue and surplus. No schedule of remuneration for Chief, Council or staff was included in the financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($817,815) + Dept of Fisheries ($1,142,643) + FNHA ($426,018) + Federal Government ($56,318) + Province of BC ($348,159) + Kwumut Lelum ($102,030) = $2,892,983; OSR = total revenue $4,163,596 minus $2,892,953 = $1,270,643. Housing expenses combined Band Housing ($64,207) and Social Housing ($69,389) = $133,596. Capital Fund expenses of $398,338 classified under expenses but not mapped to a specific program category.
